mapper.select: SELECT A1.USER_ID AS ID , DECRYPT(A1.USER_NM) AS NAME , A1.PASSWORD AS PASSWORD , A1.IHIDNUM AS IHID_NUM , DECRYPT(A1.EMAIL_ADRES) AS EMAIL , A1.USER_SE AS USER_SE , A1.ORGNZT_ID AS ORGNZT_ID , A1.ESNTL_ID AS UNIQ_ID , A1.GROUP_ID AS GROUP_ID , B1.GROUP_NM AS GROUP_NM FROM ARMUSER A1 LEFT OUTER JOIN LETTNAUTHORGROUPINFO B1 ON A1.GROUP_ID = B1.GROUP_ID WHERE A1.USER_SE = #{userSe} AND A1.USER_ID = #{id} AND A1.PASSWORD = #{password} AND A1.MBER_STTUS = 'P'

SELECT A1.USER_ID AS ID , DECRYPT(A1.USER_NM) AS NAME , A1.PASSWORD AS PASSWORD , A1.IHIDNUM AS IHID_NUM , DECRYPT(A1.EMAIL_ADRES) AS EMAIL , A1.USER_SE AS USER_SE , A1.ORGNZT_ID AS ORGNZT_ID , A1.ESNTL_ID AS UNIQ_ID , A1.GROUP_ID AS GROUP_ID , B1.GROUP_NM AS GROUP_NM FROM ARMUSER A1 LEFT OUTER JOIN LETTNAUTHORGROUPINFO B1 ON A1.GROUP_ID = B1.GROUP_ID WHERE A1.USER_ID = #{email} AND A1.USER_SE = #{userSe} AND A1.MBER_STTUS = 'P'
SELECT A1.USER_SE FROM ARMUSER A1 WHERE A1.USER_ID = #{_parameter} AND A1.MBER_STTUS = 'P' LIMIT 1
SELECT A1.ESNTL_ID AS ESNTL_ID , A1.USER_ID AS USER_ID FROM ARMUSER A1 WHERE A1.CRTFC_DN_VALUE = #{crtfcDnValue} AND A1.USER_SE = #{userSe} AND IFNULL(A1.MBER_STTUS, '') <> 'D' LIMIT 1

SELECT A1.ESNTL_ID AS ESNTL_ID , A1.USER_ID AS USER_ID , A1.USER_SE AS USER_SE , A1.MBER_STTUS AS MBER_STTUS , COALESCE(A1.OAUTH_GB, '') AS OAUTH_GB , COALESCE(A1.NAVER_AUTH_ID, '') AS NAVER_AUTH_ID , COALESCE(A1.KAKAO_AUTH_ID, '') AS KAKAO_AUTH_ID FROM ARMUSER A1 WHERE A1.USER_ID = #{email} AND A1.USER_SE = #{userSe} AND A1.MBER_STTUS = 'P'
mapper.update:
UPDATE ARMUSER
SET NAVER_AUTH_ID = '', OAUTH_GB = CASE WHEN COALESCE(KAKAO_AUTH_ID, '') <> '' THEN '02' ELSE '00' END, CHG_LAST_DT = NOW()
SET KAKAO_AUTH_ID = '', OAUTH_GB = CASE WHEN COALESCE(NAVER_AUTH_ID, '') <> '' THEN '01' ELSE '00' END, CHG_LAST_DT = NOW()
SET CHG_LAST_DT = NOW()
WHERE ESNTL_ID = #{esntlId}
mapper.select: SELECT A1.USER_ID AS ID , DECRYPT(A1.USER_NM) AS NAME , A1.PASSWORD AS PASSWORD , A1.IHIDNUM AS IHID_NUM , DECRYPT(A1.EMAIL_ADRES) AS EMAIL , A1.USER_SE AS USER_SE , A1.ORGNZT_ID AS ORGNZT_ID , A1.ESNTL_ID AS UNIQ_ID , A1.GROUP_ID AS GROUP_ID , B1.GROUP_NM AS GROUP_NM FROM ARMUSER A1 LEFT OUTER JOIN LETTNAUTHORGROUPINFO B1 ON A1.GROUP_ID = B1.GROUP_ID WHERE A1.ESNTL_ID = #{_parameter} AND A1.MBER_STTUS = 'P'

SELECT EMPLYR_ID AS ID , DECRYPT(USER_NM) AS NAME , PASSWORD AS PASSWORD , IHIDNUM AS IHID_NUM , DECRYPT(EMAIL_ADRES) AS EMAIL , 'USR' AS USER_SE , ORGNZT_ID AS ORGNZT_ID , ESNTL_ID AS UNIQ_ID FROM LETTNEMPLYRINFO WHERE CRTFC_DN_VALUE = #{dn}
